title: alsine laeta
intro: Alsine laeta, also known as sweet woodruff, is a perennial flowering plant in the bedstraw family (Galium). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Alsine laeta include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Alsine laeta include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to soothe the digestive system and promote overall well-being.
